profile.name: Luna
profile.title: Child of Moonlight Luna
profile.story: Lulus, very rarely sighted and often considered mythical, are a race of animal hybrids. They live in an extremely cold region, and are very fearful of contacting the outside world. One day, a Lulu child was born with the exact opposite personality that is typical her race. That child is Luna. It's not that she was unhappy with the ways of her people. Nor did she have any grand purpose of experiencing the world outside. She was simply picking flowers, one step at a time. Another step to pick up some frozen branches for her slingshot. And another step to follow the scent of some sweet, red fruit. Before she knew it, she was outside, running toward a carrot field away from the mountain.

1.name: Pew!
1.description:
Launches an attack that bounces [64ffff]4[-] times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing [ffc800]460*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 292% of ATK[-] M.DMG to each enemy hit. DMG increases by up to [ffc800]100%[-] the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

2.name: Look out above!
2.description:
Deals [ffc800]508*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 321.8% of ATK[-] M.DMG [64ffff]2 time(s)[-] to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and [fa96fa]stuns[-] them for [64ffff]1sec[-]. DMG increases by up to [ffc800]200%[-] the farther the enemy is.

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

3.name: Twinkle Twinkle
3.description:
Deals [ffc800]132*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 84% of ATK[-] M.DMG [64ffff]6 time(s)[-] to enemies within range, [fa96fa]knocks them back[-] for [64ffff]1.5sec[-], and reduces Crit Chance by [ff6464]60%[-] for [64ffff]4sec[-]. DMG increases by up to [ffc800]150%[-] the farther the enemy is.

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

4.name: Gotcha!
4.description:
Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing [ffc800]440*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 278.6% of ATK[-] M.DMG, [fa96fa]knocking them back[-] for [64ffff]1sec[-], and increasing M.DMG taken by [ff6464]20%[-] for [64ffff]6sec[-]. DMG increases by up to [ffc800]200%[-] the farther the enemy is.

[ffc800]Awakening Coefficient([-]★1 ~ 5[ffc800]): [[-] 1 / 2 / 3.5 / 5.5 / 8 [ffc800]][-]

light.effect: Mana cost is increased by 2000, but the number of hits is increased by 2.

dark.effect: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy.
Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 500 for 4 sec.

light.effect: Removes positive effects from the target.

dark.effect: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 15%, and damage taken is reduced by 15%.

uw.name: Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth
uw.description: Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.
uw.story: A slingshot made from hyacinth, a silver tree that only grows in extremely cold regions. It is said that hyacinths have been blessed by the Queen of Ice, and are able to bear bright red fruits even in the coldest weather. Simply holding onto a hyacinth branch allows one to ignore the coldness around the holder. These blessed trees also have the power to call upon snowstorms and frost. Needless to say, these powers are best harnessed by a weapon carved from one of these trees.

1.name: Golden Bell of Luck
1.description: [Pew!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by 200.
1.story:
A golden bell that brings luck.
It's Luna's second favorite thing after carrots, and it brightly glitters when she walks and trots. The sound of the golden bell has a mystical power that summons luck from her homeland.

2.name: Moonlight Carrot
2.description: [Look Out Above!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Cooldown by 10% upon a Crit Hit.
2.story:
A carrot that grew from receiving moonlight a thousand times. 
Those hit by this carrot will have all evil stripped away from them, and they'll be able to tell apart good from bad.

3.name: Never-Melting Snow Flower
3.description: [Twinkle Twinkle] Reduces M.Crit Resist by {0}, and this reduction becomes irremovable.
3.story: A legendary snowfield flower that blossomed from the never melting land of Windland Snow Mountain. It is said that it makes the energy of its master's body flow clearly and beautifully. An item that makes Luna's pure energy shine even brighter.

4.name: Carrot Cake
4.description: [Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec.
4.story:
Juno's special carrot cake.
This special carrot cake was made especially for Luna, who misses her family back in her hometown and the carrots she used to eat.
As it has the exact same taste like the ones Luna would eat back at home, the cake has become Luna's new soul food.

sw.description: Summons the Soul of Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth, dealing [ffc800]100% of ATK[-] M.DMG to nearby enemies, [fa96fa]freezing[-] them for [64ffff]5sec[-] and [fa96fa]knocking them back[-]. Afterward, deals [ffc800]600% of ATK[-] M.DMG to [fa96fa]frozen[-] enemies and increases own Crit DMG by [64ff64]100%[-] for [64ffff]10sec[-].

advancement.1: For the duration, increases Normal Attack range by 20%.
advancement.2: For the duration, increases NFor the duration, Normal Attacks hit 2 targets and knock them back for 1 sec.ormal Attack range by 2%.

sw.story:
The flower never withered. No matter how hard the rain fell, no matter how much snow poured, it stayed strong. Like Luna’s endless innocence, the flower did not wither but showed off its presence instead.. The flower abolished the cold of the steep snow mountain, and quelled the raging snowstorm for the tiny, weak girl, and followed wherever she went. Eventually, when the innocent girl’s curiosity touched the flower, it showed the girl its true form. 
- You have finally found me, dear little girl.
